description: The basic-call cases (identity + real-RTP media with classifier replay) driven through the ALREADY-RUNNING kind cluster: alice and bob1 on the host's kind-bridge address (172.20.0.1), calls ingressing the sip-front-proxy VRRP VIP (172.20.255.250), the b-leg pinned to bob1 via X-Api-Call.destination and still riding LB-first per the production invariant.
